steps.t: The summoning horn can be found near Svanr on the stairs of Khadar-zarâm. You should summon Svanr to let him know when you are ready to depart.
Braziers can be found at the feet of the dwarf-statues along the north edge of Nud-melek's Second Hall. You should light the braziers as a tribute to …
The Bridge of Khazad-dûm is east of the stone dwarves in the Second Hall. You should travel with Svanr to the Bridge of Khazad-dûm.
Svanr is at the Bridge of Khazad-dûm.
